payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Dark brown stained wooden cabinet door with a single recessed rectangular panel and narrow stiles, vertical orientation and a smooth semi-gloss finish with faint reflections; the door is mostly visible but its left edge is close to the crop border (slightly edge-cropped); estimated distance ~1.2 m from camera.
attributes: left edge near crop border (slightly cropped)
